projects.projectName: Printing of Numeracy Workbooks and Teachers Guides

summary.zh: P1-P3数学作业册及教师指南印刷，CIP送至UNICEF弗里敦仓库
summary.en: Printing of P1–P3 numeracy workbooks and teacher's guides; CIP delivery to the UNICEF Freetown warehouse

specs.en: A4, full colour, 80gsm text stock, 230gsm cover, PUR / perfect binding

sampleRequired.en: May be requested at a later stage

qualifications.zh: 公司注册、税务、社保、UNGM号、类似业绩
qualifications.en: Company registration, tax & social security certificates, UNGM number, comparable track record

pastPerformance.zh: 至少两个类似印刷合同，其中一个需在采购方所在国执行
pastPerformance.en: At least two comparable printing contracts, at least one executed in the buyer's country

customsResponsibility.zh: 供应商负责运输、清关、送仓
customsResponsibility.en: Supplier responsible for freight, customs clearance and warehouse delivery

openQuestions.zh: 是否仍可进入后续供应商名单
openQuestions.en: Whether it's still possible to join the subsequent supplier roster

nextAction.zh: 联系UNICEF Sierra Leone表达后续参与意向
nextAction.en: Contact UNICEF Sierra Leone to express interest in future rounds

latestUpdate.zh: 用于复盘招标监控机制
latestUpdate.en: Used to review the tender-monitoring process

projects.projectName: Invitation to Tender for ALP Printing (Book & Cards)

summary.zh: 印刷并供应ALP（加速学习项目）课程材料（书籍与卡片），交付至尼泊尔Malangwa、Sarlahi及Martadi、Bajura指定地点
summary.en: Printing and supply of Accelerated Learning Programme (ALP) curriculum materials (books & cards), delivered to specified locations in Malangwa, Sarlahi, and Martadi, Bajura, Nepal

intlSuppliersAllowed.zh: 否（仅限尼泊尔本地供应商）

nextAction.zh: 本地供应商限定，无需跟进；保留用于监控该地区平台动态
nextAction.en: No follow-up needed (locally restricted); kept to track this market's tender activity

notes.zh: 经Claude搜索核实，标书已关闭且限本地供应商，仅作监控参考
notes.en: Verified via Claude web search; already closed and restricted to local suppliers — kept for monitoring reference only

projects.projectName: Printing of School Textbooks/Modules for the Year 2026

summary.zh: 斯里兰卡教育出版司2026学年学校教材/模块印刷招标，标书需付费购买（不可退还的10万卢比）
summary.en: Sri Lanka's Educational Publications Department tendered the printing of school textbooks/modules for the 2026 academic year; bid documents required a non-refundable Rs. 100,000 purchase fee

nextAction.zh: 已过期约一年，作为该地区教材印刷招标节奏参考，明年同期可提前关注
nextAction.en: Expired roughly a year ago; kept as a reference point for this market's tender cadence — worth checking again around the same time next cycle

notes.zh: 经Claude搜索核实，招标已过期，非UNGM/UNICEF/World Bank等核心监控平台，归档留存
notes.en: Verified via Claude web search; tender has expired and sits outside the core UNGM/UNICEF/World Bank platforms — archived for reference
